pack.name: HVAC Maintenance
pack.description: Recurring furnace, air conditioner, and air quality maintenance tasks.
pack.author: Home Maintenance Manager

entity_requirements.name: HVAC runtime
entity_requirements.description: Optional runtime or power source for the main HVAC blower or condenser.

tasks.name: Replace HVAC filter
tasks.description: Replace or clean the main HVAC return filter.
tasks.instructions: Turn off the fan, remove the old filter, confirm airflow direction, install the new filter, and restart the system.

tasks.name: Schedule seasonal HVAC service
tasks.description: Book professional heating/cooling service before peak season.
tasks.instructions: Schedule inspection, cleaning, refrigerant/combustion checks, condensate drain review, and safety checks.

tasks.name: Check HVAC filter after runtime
tasks.description: Inspect the filter after heavy HVAC usage.
tasks.instructions: Inspect the filter and replace it early if it is visibly loaded with dust or debris.
